doghotel

Class Hotel

  • java.lang.Object
    • doghotel.Hotel

  • public class Hotel
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Hotel(java.lang.String hotelName, double dailyRate, int capacity)
      Parameterized constructor to create a Hotel object

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean addGuest(Guest guest)
      Used to add a guest to the ArrayList and then sort the list by room number.
      int checkInGuest(Guest guest, Date today)
      This method checks for an empty room and if one is found it sets the room number and the check in date in the guest object parameter and calls addGuest() so that the guest is added to the ArrayList and then sorted.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Hotel

        public Hotel(java.lang.String hotelName,
             double dailyRate,
             int capacity)
        Parameterized constructor to create a Hotel object
        Parameters:
        hotelName - the name of the Hotel
        dailyRate - the cost of a room
        capacity - the number of rooms in this physical facility

    • Method Detail

      • addGuest

        public boolean addGuest(Guest guest)
        Used to add a guest to the ArrayList and then sort the list by room number. Used by: the start of day routines in the driver as well as the checkInGuest() method in this class
        Parameters:
        guest - a Guest object with values for all fields
        Returns:
        true if there is room for the guest, false if we have hit the physical limit of the facility.

      • checkInGuest

        public int checkInGuest(Guest guest,
                        Date today)
        This method checks for an empty room and if one is found it sets the room number and the check in date in the guest object parameter and calls addGuest() so that the guest is added to the ArrayList and then sorted.
        Parameters:
        guest -
        today -
        Returns:
